commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Evening, and morning, and at noon, will I pray, and cry aloud: and he shall hear my voice. The Hebrew then began the day. (Calmet) (Genesis i. ) (Haydock) They had three times allotted for prayer, (Daniel vi. ) as the Church had afterwards. ) (Calmet) Evening song, matins, and the sacrifice of the mass, are the principal times for divine service. (Worthington) David comprises all times, because his prayer was continual. (Berthier) (Calmet).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
